case_title: NOE MURPHY VS. CLAIRE KELLY et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLY, CLAIRE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MURPHY, NOE AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, CLAIRE DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CLAIRE KELLY'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED. CLAIRE KELLY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647 (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF REPORTER FEE PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62) AS TO DEFENDANT KELLY, CLAIRE
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLY, CLAIRE HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT KELLY, CLAIRE HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CLAIRE KELLY'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER DENIED AS TO JURY FEES AND EXPENSES AND REPORTER FEES. CLAIRE KELLY HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647 (206)
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-22-2009 - AS PER PLTF'S COUNSEL, LAWRENCE M SCANCARELLI, THIS CASE IS OFF CALENDAR AS POSSESSION IS NO LONGER AN ISSUE.
FEES NOT PAID. FILINGS OF CLAIRE KELLY ARE STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES.
NOTICE TO DEFENDANTS

REMOVED FROM DENIED FEE WAIVER PAID CALENDAR: THE ANSWER FILED BY DEFT, CLAIRE KELLY WAS STRICKEN FOR NON PAYMENT OF FEES. THERE ARE NO OTHER FILINGS TO STRIKE.
